versionEntries.text: Moltres is a legendary bird Pokémon that has the ability to control fire. If this Pokémon is injured, it is said to dip its body in the molten magma of a volcano to burn and heal itself.
One of the legendary bird Pokémon. It is said that its appearance indicates the coming of spring.
